modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add confirmed 25Live events to USD Calendar

full_description_text: 
User was trying to add events from 25Live to USD Calendar. Events are confirmed but not showing up. There seems to be a sync issue or something. Not sure if it's a permissions thing or a data transfer problem.
short_description: Unable to add confirmed 25Live events to USD Calendar
description: User was trying to add events from 25Live to USD Calendar. Events are confirmed but not showing up. There seems to be a sync issue or something. Not sure if it's a permissions thing or a data transfer problem.
